meta.description: Production-verified Tray.io script templates from Embedded projects

salesforce_response_handler.name: Salesforce Composite Response Handler
salesforce_response_handler.description: Complete template for processing Salesforce composite/batch API responses with comprehensive error handling

lookup_transformation.description: Build lookup maps and transform data efficiently using filter-reduce patterns

simple_aggregation.description: Aggregate statistics from arrays of objects using reduce

minimal_orchestration.description: Clean orchestration-only exports.step with all logic in helpers

status_mapping.description: Map between different status enumerations with defaults

config_builder.name: Configuration Object Builder
config_builder.description: Build configuration objects with defaults and conditional fields

array_chunking.description: Split large arrays into chunks to stay under 400KB payload limit

lodash_data_processing.name: Lodash Data Processing
lodash_data_processing.description: Use lodash for advanced data manipulation

moment_date_processing.name: Date Processing with Moment
moment_date_processing.description: Parse, validate, and format dates using moment-timezone

crypto_operations.description: Generate hashes and UUIDs using crypto module

url_operations.description: Parse and build URLs with query parameters

buffer_encoding.name: Buffer Encoding/Decoding
buffer_encoding.description: Encode and decode data using Buffer for base64 operations
